#include <vector>
#include <algorithm> // for max_element

using namespace std;

class Solution {
public:
    long long repairCars(vector<int>& ranks, int cars) {
        if (cars == 0) return 0; // though constraints say cars >=1
        
        int r_max = *max_element(ranks.begin(), ranks.end());
        long long low = 0;
        long long high = (long long) cars * cars * r_max;
        
        while (low < high) {
            long long mid = low + (high - low) / 2;
            long long total = 0;

            if (total >= cars) {
                high = mid;
            } else {
                low = mid + 1;
            }
        }
        
        return low;
    }
};

solution: 
```cpp
#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>

using namespace std;

class Solution {
public:
    long long repairCars(vector<int>& ranks, int cars) {
        int r_max = *max_element(ranks.begin(), ranks.end());
        long long low = 0;
        long long high = (long long) cars * cars * r_max;
        
        while (low < high) {
            long long mid = low + (high - low) / 2;
            long long total = 0;
            
            for (int r : ranks) {
                double val = static_cast<double>(mid) / r;
                int x = static_cast<int>(sqrt(val));
                total += x;
                if (total >= cars) break;
            }
            
            if (total >= cars) {
                high = mid;
            } else {
                low = mid + 1;
            }
        }
        
        return low;
    }
};
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(N log M), where N is the number of mechanics and M is the maximum possible time.
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution uses binary search to find the minimum time required. For each potential time, it calculates how many cars each mechanic can repair and checks if the total meets the requirement. This approach efficiently narrows down the possible time using binary search, ensuring optimal performance even for large inputs.
